title: New paper accepted in Health Economics on DCEA methodology
summary: Our paper reviewing distributional cost-effectiveness analysis methods has been accepted for publication in Health Economics.

title: Presented at iHEA World Congress 2023
summary: Presented research on distributional CEA applications in Australian HTA at the iHEA World Congress in Cape Town.

title: Received AHES Student Prize for Best Paper
summary: Awarded the Australian Health Economics Society Student Prize for best paper at the 2023 annual conference.
